segments.text: The Mighty One, God, the Lord, speaks and summons the earth from the rising of the sun to where it sets.
From Zion, perfect in beauty, God shines forth.
Our God comes and will not be silent; a fire devours before him, and around him a tempest rages.
He summons the heavens above, and the earth, that he may judge his people:
Gather to me this consecrated people, who made a covenant with me by sacrifice.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And the heavens proclaim his righteousness, for he is a God of justice.
Listen, my people, and I will speak; I will testify against you, Israel: I am God, your God.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I bring no charges against you concerning your sacrifices or concerning your burnt offerings, which are ever before me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I have no need of a bull from your stall or of goats from your pens,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: for every animal of the forest is mine, and the cattle on a thousand hills.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I know every bird in the mountains, and the insects in the fields are mine.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: If I were hungry I would not tell you, for the world is mine, and all that is in it.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do I eat the flesh of bulls or drink the blood of goats?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Sacrifice thank offerings to God, fulfill your vows to the Most High,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and call on me in the day of trouble; I will deliver you, and you will honor me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: What right have you to recite my laws or take my covenant on your lips?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You hate my instruction and cast my words behind you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: When you see a thief, you join with him; you throw in your lot with adulterers.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You use your mouth for evil and harness your tongue to deceit.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You sit and testify against your brother and slander your own mother's son.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: When you did these things and I kept silent, you thought I was exactly like you. But I now arraign you and set my accusations before you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Consider this, you who forget God, or I will tear you to pieces, with no one to rescue you:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Those who sacrifice thank offerings honor me, and to the blameless I will show my salvation.
segments.speaker: God
